# Only for Teachers

## About
Only for Teachers is the UK's leading teacher survey and research platform. We publish weekly surveys of UK teachers and produce the UK Teacher Pulse Index - a multi-dimensional sentiment tracker measuring teacher confidence, workload, support and optimism.

## Key pages
- Teacher Pulse Index: /teacher-index
- Survey insights and research: /survey-results
- About: /about
- Latest research: /survey-results

## Data
We survey 870+ verified UK teachers weekly.
All data is original primary research.
Data collected since September 2025.

## Contact
hello@onlyforteachers.co.uk
